product_overview: Web-first Arabic tutoring marketplace for Egypt that lets visitors discover approved teachers, and lets students, parents, and teachers manage bookings, manual payments, attendance, and lesson follow-up. The MVP focuses on trust, admin verification, and a clear booking-to-confirmation workflow using Django templates.
core_goals: Enable public browsing of approved teachers and subjects without registration
Support student, parent, and teacher account creation and authentication
Allow teachers to complete profiles, upload credentials, and receive admin approval before appearing publicly
Provide booking flows for lessons with conflict prevention and teacher/student dashboards
Support manual local payment collection with receipt upload and admin verification
Track attendance, lesson completion, teacher wallet balances, and withdrawals
Allow reviews, complaints, reports, and parent linkage for lesson follow-up and trust
Give admins operational control over approvals, payments, bookings, complaints, and metrics

features.name: Account Management
features.description: Users can register, log in, and manage their profile so they can access booking and role-specific features.
user_flows: GET /accounts/register/ to show the registration page -> POST /accounts/register/ with valid student details -> Receive account creation and access to the appropriate dashboard
GET /accounts/login/ to show the login page -> POST /accounts/login/ with valid credentials -> Receive authenticated session and redirect to the role dashboard
GET /accounts/profile/ without authentication -> Receive 403 or redirect to login

features.name: Teacher Profiles
features.description: Teachers can set up their public-facing profile, while visitors can browse approved teacher listings and profile pages.
user_flows: GET /teachers/ -> Receive list of approved teachers only -> GET /teachers/<id>/ for an approved teacher -> Receive detailed teacher profile
GET /teachers/profile/setup/ with authenticated teacher account -> Submit profile setup data -> Receive teacher dashboard/profile setup confirmation pending admin review
GET /teachers/<id>/ for a pending, rejected, or suspended teacher -> Receive 404 or hidden profile response

features.name: Bookings
features.description: Students and parents can create lesson bookings, view booking details, and cancel bookings according to policy.
user_flows: GET /teachers/<id>/ to review a teacher -> POST /bookings/create/<teacher_id>/ with authenticated student and valid slot details -> Receive booking created with pending payment or awaiting teacher acceptance
GET /bookings/ to view booking list -> GET /bookings/<id>/ for an existing booking -> Receive booking details including schedule and status
POST /bookings/<id>/cancel/ with authenticated user and cancellable booking -> Receive cancellation confirmation and updated booking status
POST /bookings/create/<teacher_id>/ with overlapping slot request -> Receive validation error preventing conflicting booking

features.name: Teacher Profiles
features.description: Manage teacher bio, subjects, availability, and certificates.

features.name: Bookings
features.description: Booking tutoring lessons, cancellation, and attendance confirmation.
